title: toheee1234's Better Combat Animations
description: This resource pack reanimates Better Combat's default animations!
body:
This resource pack simply reanimates Better Combat's animations in a different style. It's a work in progress, and many versions will come to improve the animations. 

**When downloaded, put it into your resourcepacks folder. Go in game, apply it, and then restart the game for the animations to work.**

also, i recommend playing with these using third-person mods that allow seamless combat gameplay! for me personally, its more fun that way.

check out my texturepack!
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stupendous-visuals
